query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT university_name) as university_count, COUNT(*) as total_professors FROM professors WHERE university_name IS NOT NULL AND university_name != '';
SELECT university_name, COUNT(*) as professor_count FROM professors WHERE university_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY university_name ORDER BY university_name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT university_name) as university_count, COUNT(*) as total_professors FROM professors WHERE university_name IS NOT NULL AND university_name != '';
SELECT university_name, COUNT(*) as professor_count FROM professors WHERE university_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY university_name ORDER BY university_name;

rows.university_count: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
